name: oda-shopping-assistant
description: Oda grocery shopping assistant — safe cart planning, order history analysis, and delivery slot discovery.
author: oda-agent-kit

configSchema.description: Set ODA_EMAIL and ODA_PASSWORD in the environment before launching OpenClaw. Reload the plugin after changing either value.

toolGroups.name: read-only
toolGroups.description: Safe, read-only tools for browsing products, cart, orders, and delivery slots.

tools.name: searchProducts
tools.description: Search for products in the Oda catalogue by keyword.

tools.name: getShoppingLists
tools.description: List the user's saved shopping lists.

tools.name: analyseOrderHistory
tools.description: Analyse past orders and return a summary of frequently ordered products.

tools.name: buildShoppingList
tools.description: Resolve plain-text queries into a structured shopping list without mutating the cart.

tools.name: findCheapestDeliverySlot
tools.description: Return the cheapest available delivery slot without booking it.

toolGroups.name: cart-mutation
toolGroups.description: Optional tools that modify the cart. Must be explicitly enabled by the user.

tools.name: prepareCart
tools.description: Add all items from a shopping list to the cart. Requires explicit user confirmation before use.

tools.name: addToCart
tools.description: Add a single product to the cart. Requires explicit user confirmation before use.

tools.name: removeFromCart
tools.description: Remove an item from the cart by cart-item ID from getCart (`cart.items[].id`). Requires explicit user confirmation before use.

tools.name: clearCart
tools.description: Remove all items from the cart. Requires explicit user confirmation before use.

toolGroups.name: high-risk
toolGroups.description: High-risk tools for order placement and payment. OUT OF SCOPE for v0 — not implemented.

tools.name: placeOrder
tools.description: NOT IMPLEMENTED. Final order placement is out of scope for v0. See highRiskTools.ts.
